pageContext.name: Professor Xavier - X-Men Mini Co.
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Iron Studios are proud to announce the Professor Xavier Mini Co. Collectible Figure from the Mini Co. Series line.  These hand-painted Professor X collectible figures were created by Iron Studios and are the perfect size for any desk or shelf no matter the size of your Marvel collection.  A must-have for fans of X-Men and Marvel collectibles!
